title: campanula scheuchzeri subsp. witasekiana
intro: Campanula scheuchzeri subsp. witasekiana, also known as alpine bellflower, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Campanulaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional folk medicine, where it has been used to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis, coughs, and colds due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Campanula scheuchzeri subsp. witasekiana include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and improving respiratory function, making it a valuable herb for individuals suffering from respiratory conditions. Herbal preparations of this plant typically involve drying the flowers and leaves, which are then used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal purposes.
